name: Victoria VR - ESCAPE to Nature GALLERY

reviews.review_title: A NICE & FREE NATURE-THEMED VR GALLERY
reviews.review_description: A free virtual reality discovery app that transports you to an immersive gallery dedicated to nature and the environment through the works of two award-winning artists, photography, and documentary film. The room itself is decorated with artworks such as statuettes, masks, and a gramophone, all featuring beautiful lighting effects and rendered in high definition. Very cool.
it is only the begining, can't wait to see thz full victoria vr world !!!

A comment about the app. It is fatal, that the controls are reversed, the displacement is always with the left joystick, the camera turns are not pleasant, that they are in jumps makes a lot of dizziness and should be smooth. they should add pointer scrolling because people who are not used to it get very dizzy. The door is a nice detail as is the gramophone. I did not pay attention to the pictures

reviews.review_title: The game has a huge potential
reviews.review_description: Like the concept of exploring the world in VR. Very beautiful!

First, thank you developers for this beautiful VR gallery experience.   I enjoyed it very much.  It is educated messages to all of us, many beautiful animals we live together on earth.  The photographs and the videos are all excellent images to view.  Can I ask for more please if possible.
It was like feeling the beauty and wonder of nature right next to you.  I think it will be a good resource for children's education as well.  I hope that more diverse content will be added.

there is a gallery with photos and a video, not sure what is there to do. no guidance 
 at all.
But add a background environment please? maybe buildings or trees or whatever. Thanks
This looks like it is going to be the next big thing!

So this is what we have to look forward to... or at least a glimpse of what they can do. This is a taster and a tester. I love the company and I have no doubt what they are bringing with their MMORPG will be huge! If you need help with the puzzle check out my video over on Youtube: Reality On VR. There you will find the answer to your problems!
Really promising. I’m so excited for this project

reviews.review_title: Gallery is nice, didn't stay for the mov
reviews.review_description: It was nice to walk around in the gallery, but I didn't see the point of watching the 2D movie ... in VR. Still, very promising and excited to see where this goes.

This really shows what pictures can really become in VR  - beautiful in Ultra HD.  I got the 1st puzzle, but the 2nd lock one has me stuck not knowing if it is number of pictures, individual count within picture(s) or what. I tried both with no luck so far. Would be nice to get a 'hint' for these.  May have to wait until someone does a 'gameplay' video.  Giving 4 stars because I'm guessing what is behind the VR door will be amazing when I can get into it.  Not 5 because I can't get to it yet.
Definitely one of the better non-gaming VR experiences.
Cant wait for 4K!
This is an anticipation of the VR world that will unfold in the future.!1
Just a bunch of 2D images...

This game should not be seen as an escape game.
Too unfriendly to solve.
It's just a content to see the gallery.
don't lose your time
cant wait to see it
